withdrawal_reason: Duplicate of EXP-251 (HNOTE-001 §B3 prefix unification). The 17:12Z analyst run read a stale tracker snapshot from the clean clone (items=248, next_id=250) before realizing EXP-251 had already been written by an earlier 16:19Z run. The work product was sound but redundant. Withdrawn so the decider does not see two B3 EXPs and integrate the wrong one. EXP-251 is the canonical B3 delivery.
decider_action_required: Skip this file. Read EXP-251-phase-b3-prefix-unification.json instead.
notes_for_audit: The withdrawn EXP's analysis included a working two-pass rename script (boundary regex + 2 special cases for vb-${verdict} and vb-[a-z_]+). If EXP-251 lacks either of those special cases, the decider may want to cross-check; otherwise this file can be ignored. The original (pre-withdrawal) content of this file was 32918 bytes and listed 65 classes for renaming via "ds-" prepend; see git history if recovery is needed.
